name: Seria Co., Ltd.
summary: Seria Co., Ltd. operates merchandise stores in Japan. As of March 31, 2019, it operated 1,592 stores comprising 1,543 directly managed stores and 49 franchise chain stores. The company was formerly known as Sanyo Agency Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Seria Co., Ltd. in April 2003. Seria Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Ogaki, Japan.
